entry.title: Lissy93 closed a pull request in awesome-privacy
entry.content:

Add SaneHosts #409

Type

Addition

Changes

Adds SaneHosts to the Host Block Lists section.

SaneHosts is a native macOS hosts file manager that makes blocking ads, trac…
